$comment: Generated by `ratchet index` from file content - the routing index for this knowledge library.
name: pitfalls

entries.title: Pitfall: 64-bit atomic field alignment
entries.summary: `sync/atomic`'s 64-bit ops (`AddInt64`, `LoadInt64`, ...) require their operand to be 64-bit aligned.

entries.title: Pitfall: channel deadlocks and leaks
entries.summary: Sends/receives on an unbuffered channel block until the other side is ready. Mismatched send/receive

entries.title: Pitfall: capturing the loop variable in a goroutine/closure
entries.summary: Closures capture a variable by reference, not by value. A goroutine or closure that refers to the loop

entries.title: Pitfall: writing to a nil map
entries.summary: A nil map reads fine (returns zero values) but PANICS on write at runtime - `go build` accepts it; the

entries.title: Pitfall: slice aliasing and append surprises
entries.summary: A slice is a view (pointer, len, cap) over a backing array. Slices that share a backing array alias

entries.title: Pitfall: unused imports and variables
